description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:bullseye Docker image and a global before_script that updates apt and installs build-essential, pulseaudio, libpulse-dev, libx11-dev, libxrandr-dev, libxext-dev, libxi-dev, libgl1-mesa-glx, libgl1-mesa-dev, libwayland-dev, libwayland-egl-backend-dev, libasound2-dev, cmake, then prints gcc, g++, ldd, cmake versions and echoes CI_COMMIT_TAG and CI_COMMIT_SHA. Define a single stage named build. Add a build-linux job in the build stage that runs ./build-release.sh, ./run-tests.sh, and moves build/target/ia to ia_linux_x64_${CI_COMMIT_TAG}, produces an artifact named ia_linux_x64_${CI_COMMIT_TAG} containing that file, and runs only for tag pipelines. Add a build-windows job in the build stage that first installs mingw-w64 via apt, then runs ./build-release-windows-cross-compile.sh, moves build/target/ia to ia_windows_x64_${CI_COMMIT_TAG}, creates an artifact named ia_windows_x64_${CI_COMMIT_TAG} with that file, and also runs only for tag pipelines.
